daily_summary.headline: Exciting Aurora and SpaceX Launches Await

top_events.title: Aurora Alert: G2 Storm Expected
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering a good chance for aurora viewing at latitudes down to 60°.
top_events.action: Prepare for aurora viewing if skies are clear.

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX is set to launch another batch of Starlink satellites, continuing its mission to expand global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: SpaceX Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 Resupply Mission
top_events.description: SpaceX's Dragon spacecraft will deliver supplies to the International Space Station, supporting ongoing scientific research.

alerts.title: G2 Geomagnetic Storm Alert
alerts.message: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected on 2026-05-15, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at latitudes down to 60°.
alerts.action_required: Prepare for aurora viewing if skies are clear.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
